text: The day is approaching - October 15, 2024, the day players have been waiting for almost the entire year! We are all wondering what will come of it and how many players will play CyberTankz - and that depends only on you! We invite our friends, prepare as if it were New Year's Eve, look at the calendar, and anxiously count the days until this special day... More information can be found here.

Get ready, because one of the most eagerly awaited updates has arrived! The long-anticipated Challenges are now live in the game! Collect stars, complete stages, and unlock a plethora of incredibly awesome prizes! More information can be found here.

A major update has arrived in CyberTankz — the long-awaited matchmaking system. This system will change how battles are created and ensure players face opponents of equal skill level. More information can be found here.

We’re introducing something you’ve been eagerly waiting for! We have released a new game mode - juggernaut! Juggernaut is an individual mode where it’s every player for themselves, battling for the ultimate goal of becoming the most powerful tank in the battle! Join the game and play in the new game mode! More details can be found here.

We have great news for you! The moment you have all been waiting for has finally arrived. The long-awaited beta testing is here! Starting on August 20th, we are opening the CyberTankz for all players to join in and experience the next evolution of the game. So get ready to roll out on August 20th! For more detailed information about the beta testing and how you can participate, click here. Let's enjoy this great moment together!

Do you have great ideas for the development of our game? Join our forum and share your suggestions here. Your feedback is very important to us to improve the game in the best possible way - so it suits each one of you! We are here for you! Thank you very much for your support and ideas!

Are you a fan of Cybertankz and want to help other players? Apply for the helper position! We are looking for dedicated individuals to support the community. You can find more information and the application form here. Join us today! Good luck!

Dear tankers, We are thrilled to announce the release of our game "CyberTankz". This version features tanks from the years 2017-2020. Get ready for exciting challenges, special missions, esports battles, events, and unique features that will provide hours of captivating entertainment. Don't miss the chance to earn double experience and crystals. For more information, visit our forum: click here for more information. See you in the game!
